response.overview: Bam Margera’s infamous Iceland waterfall trip features in an unaired "lost" episode of Viva La Bam. After a night of partying, Ryan Dunn agreed to a stunt where he would be locked inside a plastic barrel and dropped over an Icelandic waterfall. Bam held Dunn to the contract the following morning and filmed the sequence.
response.tagline: What happens in Iceland, stays in Iceland... unless you're Bam Margera.
response.title: Iceland Waterfall
